system.damage: (close, area) These red-shelled insects look like a cross between an ant and a beetle, but the size of a small cat. They form colonies a few-hundred large, typically on higher ground. A colony will harvest all the dead grass in a few miles, hibernate through winter, and then relocate in spring to a part of the Flats that hasn’t burned or been harvested in a few years. They mostly ignore people and other large animals, but they’ll swarm if threatened.
system.moves:
- Burrow into/out of/through loose soil
- Swarm over a threat
- Burst with acid when killed, d4
